mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN (total_checkpoints_timed + total_checkpoints_req) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * total_checkpoints_req / (total_checkpoints_timed + total_checkpoints_req), 2) ELSE 0.0 END AS value, total_checkpoints_req AS requestedCount, total_checkpoints_timed AS timedCount FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(avg_write_time, 0.0) AS avg_write_time FROM
WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(total_checkpoints_req, 0) AS requested, COALESCE(total_checkpoints_timed, 0) AS timed FROM
WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(total_wal_bytes, 0) AS wal_bytes FROM
WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(avg_sync_time, 0.0) AS sync_time, COALESCE(avg_write_time, 0.0) AS write_time FROM
WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, CASE WHEN avg_total_time > 0 THEN ROUND((total_buffers_checkpoint / avg_total_time)::NUMERIC, 2) ELSE 0.0 END AS buffers_per_sec FROM
WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_buffers_checkpoint), 0) AS buffersWritten, COALESCE(AVG(avg_total_time), 0.0) AS avgTotalProcessTime, COALESCE(AVG(total_wal_bytes / 1048576.0), 0.0) AS checkpointDistance, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(collected_at) - MIN(collected_at))) / 60.0 / (COUNT(*) - 1) ELSE 0.0 END AS checkpointInterval, CASE WHEN AVG(avg_total_time) > 0 THEN AVG(total_wal_bytes / avg_total_time / 1048576.0) ELSE 0.0 END AS avgWalGenerationSpeed FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT instance_id FROM monitor_instance ORDER BY instance_id

SELECT checkpoint_raw_id, instance_id, collected_at, checkpoint_type, checkpoints_timed, checkpoints_req, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, buffers_checkpoint, wal_bytes, created_at, wal_files_added, wal_files_removed, checkpoint_distance, buffers_backend, avg_buffers_per_sec FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO checkpoint_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, checkpoint_type, checkpoints_timed, checkpoints_req, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, buffers_checkpoint, wal_bytes, wal_files_added, wal_files_removed, checkpoint_distance, buffers_backend, avg_buffers_per_sec, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{checkpointType}, #{checkpointsTimed}, #{checkpointsReq}, #{checkpointWriteTime}, #{checkpointSyncTime}, #{buffersCheckpoint}, #{walBytes}, #{walFilesAdded}, #{walFilesRemoved}, #{checkpointDistance}, #{buffersBackend}, #{avgBuffersPerSec}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO checkpoint_agg_1m ( instance_id, collected_at, avg_checkpoint_req_ratio, avg_write_time, avg_sync_time, avg_total_time, total_checkpoints_timed, total_checkpoints_req, total_wal_bytes, total_buffers_checkpoint, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{avgCheckpointReqRatio}, #{avgWriteTime}, #{avgSyncTime}, #{avgTotalTime}, #{totalCheckpointsTimed}, #{totalCheckpointsReq}, #{totalWalBytes}, #{totalBuffersCheckpoint}, #{status}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO checkpoint_agg_5m ( instance_id, collected_at, avg_checkpoint_req_ratio, avg_write_time, avg_sync_time, avg_total_time, total_checkpoints_timed, total_checkpoints_req, total_wal_bytes, total_buffers_checkpoint, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{avgCheckpointReqRatio}, #{avgWriteTime}, #{avgSyncTime}, #{avgTotalTime}, #{totalCheckpointsTimed}, #{totalCheckpointsReq}, #{totalWalBytes}, #{totalBuffersCheckpoint}, #{status}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT checkpoint_agg_id, instance_id, collected_at, avg_checkpoint_req_ratio, avg_write_time, avg_sync_time, avg_total_time, total_checkpoints_timed, total_checkpoints_req, total_wal_bytes, total_buffers_checkpoint, status, created_at FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at < #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at
